title: thelypteris muricata
intro: Thelypteris muricata, also known as the Rough Shield Fern or Rough-leaved Shield Fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the world. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Thelypteris muricata include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve respiratory issues, and act as an antioxidant. The herbal preparations of this plant include decoctions, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and other health problems.
